---
title: John Robin Inston
subtitle: Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics and Applied Probability.
image: assets/images/profile-picture.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@JohnRobinInston
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/John_Inston
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

::: {#bio-text}
I am a PhD candidate in the department of statistics and applied probability at the University of California Santa Barbara.  My research interests lie within the intersection of financial mathematics, stochastic games, probability theory and groundwater conservation.
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const subtitle = document.querySelector(".subtitle");
  if (!subtitle) return;

  const text = subtitle.textContent.trim();
  subtitle.textContent = "";
  subtitle.style.visibility = "visible";

  let i = 0;
  const speed = 45;

  function type() {
    if (i < text.length) {
      subtitle.textContent += text.charAt(i);
      i++;
      setTimeout(type, speed);
    } else {
      // Stop blinking cursor
      subtitle.classList.add("typed-done");

      // 1. Fade in bio
      const bio = document.getElementById("bio-text");
      if (bio) bio.style.opacity = "1";

      // 2. Draw HR after bio fade completes
      setTimeout(function () {
        const hr = document.querySelector("hr.about-sep");
        if (hr) hr.classList.add("draw-in");

        // 3. Pop in buttons one by one after HR finishes
        setTimeout(function () {
          document.querySelectorAll(".about-link").forEach(function (btn, idx) {
            setTimeout(function () {
              btn.classList.add("btn-appear");
            }, idx * 130);
          });
        }, 550);
      }, 1200);
    }
  }

  type();
});
</script>

<style>
.subtitle::after {
  content: "|";
  animation: blink 0.7s step-end infinite;
}
.subtitle.typed-done::after {
  display: none;
}
@keyframes blink {
  50% { opacity: 0; }
}

#bio-text {
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 1.0s ease-in;
}

hr.about-sep {
  clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0);
}
hr.about-sep.draw-in {
  animation: draw-hr 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
}
@keyframes draw-hr {
  to { clip-path: inset(0 0% 0 0); }
}

.about-link {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(0.75) translateY(6px);
}
.about-link.btn-appear {
  animation: btn-appear 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) forwards;
}
@keyframes btn-appear {
  to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
}
</style>
